$comment: Curated static example authored from the inventory. It is not generated by a runtime golden-flow execution.

transitions.documentEditing: Editing the title, body, comments, or attachments marks the document unsaved; Save persists that full snapshot to localStorage and returns it to a saved state.
transitions.titleValidation: Clearing the title surfaces an inline validation message on the editor.
transitions.commentThread: Submitting a reply appends a comment authored by the current user to the thread; each comment can also be deleted from the manage-comments list.
transitions.attachmentManagement: Selecting or dropping files adds local attachments; each can be removed.
transitions.documentPersistence: Save writes the title, body, comments, and attachment metadata to localStorage; reloading the page restores that saved snapshot. Discard changes reverts unsaved edits back to it without reloading.
